article_labels.why_relevant_or_not: Direct new-homes case for AI sales-agent automation, lead warming, intent extraction, and human handoff. Strongly relevant to Avito ND lead conversion and operator workflow.

must_cover_points.statement: AI sales agents can recover neglected new-development leads by engaging them over time and handing off to humans when ready.
The strongest operating model is AI-assisted human handoff, not replacing the sales team.

must_not_claim: Do not claim this proves Avito can reduce paid traffic spend causally.

article_labels.why_relevant_or_not: Direct evidence for surfacing high-intent leads, reducing response lag, and using real-time signals from CRM/workflow systems to improve conversion.

must_cover_points.statement: Real-time buyer activity signals can identify high-intent leads and reduce response lag.
AI is valuable when connected to broad CRM and behavioral data rather than isolated chatbot interactions.

optional_points: Beta metrics such as more conversations and productivity gains are useful but should be treated as vendor-reported signals.
must_not_claim: Do not present vendor beta metrics as independently verified Avito economics.

article_labels.why_relevant_or_not: Strong adjacent analogue for AI search, engagement scoring, contact enrichment, and better follow-up. Relevant to buyer matching and CDP-like prioritization, though not developer CPA.

must_cover_points.statement: Engagement scoring and contact enrichment are strong analogues for prioritizing follow-up from first-party behavior.
AI search can translate buyer preferences into more precise property alerts, supporting the matching part of the hypothesis.

optional_points: The article supports search-to-signal workflow thinking, not direct developer monetization.
must_not_claim: Do not call this a direct new-development or developer CPA case.

article_labels.why_relevant_or_not: Relevant property-data analogue: property reports, public records, and AI property advisor show why structured property data matters for matching and recommendations.

must_cover_points.statement: Structured property data from many sources can improve property reports and AI-assisted property answers.

optional_points: Public records and tax data are adjacent inputs for richer matching and listing intelligence.
must_not_claim: Do not claim this article validates lead pricing or CPA monetization.

article_labels.why_relevant_or_not: Strong listing-experience analogue for capturing buyer questions, extracting intent signals, qualifying prospects, and connecting them to agents in real time.

must_cover_points.statement: Listing-level assistants can capture buyer questions as intent signals and help qualify prospects earlier.
The article supports matching buyer context to agent follow-up, with transcripts and real-time connection as workflow inputs.

optional_points: Grounding AI in listing-provided data and compliance is an important implementation caveat.
must_not_claim: Do not claim the product directly matches buyers to new-development lots or prices developer leads.

article_labels.why_relevant_or_not: Adjacent CRM mining and seller-intent automation case. Useful for first-party data and automated nurture mechanics, but seller-side rather than new-development buyer CPA.

must_cover_points.statement: Existing CRM contacts can be mined for intent and nurtured automatically until they are ready to engage.

optional_points: This is more relevant to first-party data activation than to new-development inventory.
must_not_claim: Do not treat seller-intent mining as direct evidence for buyer-to-JK matching.

article_labels.why_relevant_or_not: Conversation intelligence case relevant to turning sales interactions into structured data for follow-up and CDP enrichment. Adjacent to Avito ND operator workflows.

must_cover_points.statement: Conversation capture can turn fragmented sales interactions into structured data for better follow-up.

optional_points: Useful for operator context and CDP enrichment in Avito ND workflows.
must_not_claim: Do not claim conversation transcription alone solves lead quality monetization.

article_labels.why_relevant_or_not: Useful only as background for portal economics and lead ownership. It should not be treated as proof of developer-specific quality-based CPA.
optional_points: Portal economics and lead ownership are useful background, but the connection to developer CPA is indirect.
must_not_claim: Do not claim Homes.com proves quality-based developer CPA.
Do not mark this article high relevance for the ND request.

article_labels.why_relevant_or_not: Richer listing content and site-plan data are relevant to recommendation quality and buyer confidence, but the article is indirect for lead scoring or CPA monetization.

must_cover_points.statement: Richer listing visuals and site-plan context can improve buyer confidence and digital-first evaluation.

optional_points: Supports content-platform and recommendation-quality aspects more than lead scoring.
must_not_claim: Do not claim site plans directly validate CPA monetization.

article_labels.why_relevant_or_not: Relevant as a risk/caveat article: AI has limits in trust-heavy, emotional, or complex real estate decisions, supporting the need for human handoff.

must_cover_points.statement: AI has limits in trust-heavy, emotional, or complex real estate decisions, so human advisory remains important.

optional_points: Useful as a caveat against fully automated operator replacement.
must_not_claim: Do not frame this article as support for replacing sales operators.

article_labels.why_relevant_or_not: Relevant risk signal for automated outreach: AI voice/cold-call workflows can create consent and legal exposure. Not direct ND evidence, but important for operating model risk.

must_cover_points.statement: Automated AI outreach can create consent, TCPA, and vendor-liability risks.

optional_points: Relevant when designing call-center or AI voice workflows around buyer activation.
must_not_claim: Do not generalize mortgage cold-call litigation into a ban on all AI follow-up.

article_labels.why_relevant_or_not: Generic AI marketing productivity discussion. It may support broad caution about replacing human voice, but should not substantively support the Avito ND investment hypothesis.
must_not_claim: Do not use this generic AI marketing article as evidence for Avito ND lead scoring, matching, or developer CPA.
Do not mark this article high or medium relevance.
